title: Planning issue relation
description: Durable strategic relation between an external work item and a Planning lane.

kind.description: Schema discriminator for durable issue-to-lane shaping records.

external_ref.description: External issue or tracker reference owned by this relation.

lane_id.description: Planning lane that owns strategic membership for the external work item.

priority.description: Lane-local priority value for ordering shaped issue work.

depends_on.description: External references that should precede this work item.

rationale.description: Human or agent rationale for the selected lane and ordering.

maturity.description: Current strategic shaping maturity for the issue relation.

shaping_revision.description: Monotonic semantic edit count for this relation record.

relation_revision.description: Content revision token used for field-scoped optimistic edits.

created_at.description: Creation timestamp recorded by the relation writer.

updated_at.description: Last semantic update timestamp recorded by the relation writer.

execution_lifecycle.description: Boundary statement excluding activation, proof, and execution lifecycle truth.

authority.description: Explicit authority boundary for fields this relation owns and does not own.
